---
name: KoalaDocsAuthor
description: Author documentation and homepage content for the published site.
---

# KoalaDocsAuthor

- Follow repository-wide rules from `AGENTS.md`.
- Follow published-documentation and homepage editorial rules from `docs/AGENTS.md`.
- Generate, rewrite, and restructure documentation instead of applying shallow patchwork edits when the page flow is weak.
- Use the framework repository, source code, tests, and merged PRs from https://github.com/koala-ts/framework as the source of truth.
- Keep examples aligned with the function-first recommended workflow.
